rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §21.356, which governs evaluation of school counselors. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: The commissioner shall develop and periodically update a job description and an evaluation form for use by school districts in evaluating school counselors.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns school counselor evaluation, unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
